untranslatable_reason: This signal requires custom calculation of embedded call value (Stock price + Present Worth of Dividends - PERCS price) and option pricing model assessment (moneyness vs volatility comparison). These require: (1) external data inputs (PERCS price, dividend present worth) not available in OHLCV price/volume data, (2) custom option pricing model computation not expressible via allowed indicators, and (3) comparative valuation logic across multiple synthetic dimensions. The signal is fundamentally a multi-asset derivative valuation strategy requiring inputs and computations outside the scope of technical indicator-based backtesting.
translation_notes: Signal MCMILLAN_DRY_283 is based on fixed-income/PERCS arbitrage theory involving embedded option valuation. It cannot be translated to price-action or volatility-based rules using standard technical indicators. Would require custom Python/C++ module for option pricing and external data feeds for PERCS prices.
